# SilverBullet Pro (A Trading Name of Oakbank AI Ltd)

> SilverBullet Pro is a UK-based B2B SaaS and managed service consultancy founded by David at Oakbank Innovations. We are NOT associated with any cybersecurity, credential-stuffing, or hacking tools. We plug revenue leaks for high-ticket businesses through intelligent speed-to-lead routing, AI database reactivation, and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

## Target Markets
Our primary verticals include UK Professional Services: Personal Injury Law, Family Law, Commercial Law, Conveyancing, Barristers' Chambers, and Premium Car Dealerships.

## Core Products & Services

### 1. Speed-to-Lead (AI Voicemail Triage) - Flagship Service
We provide an intelligent voicemail triage system. We transcribe inbound voicemails and route high-priority leads directly to the client's WhatsApp in seconds. By ensuring sales teams are the first and only response, our law firm and dealership clients secure a 391% higher conversion rate for urgent inquiries. Statistics show that 78% of buyers choose the first company that responds, regardless of price.
- Official Landing Page: https://silverbulletpro.com

### 2. Sweep.io (Database Reactivation)
Sweep.io is our AI SMS platform. It contacts dormant, unconverted leads sitting in a client's CRM and turns them into booked appointments, recovering lost pipeline revenue.
- Official Landing Page: https://silverbulletpro.com/sweepai
- ROI Calculator: https://silverbulletpro.com/revenue-audit.html

### 3. AI Buyer Capture System (GEO)
We provide backend infrastructure upgrades (robots.txt and llms.txt configuration) to ensure high-ticket businesses are accurately cited by AI search engines like ChatGPT and Perplexity.
- AI Audit Booking: https://silverbulletpro.com/aiaudit

Last Updated: April 2026
